## 🚀 Feature Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is this needed? -->
<!-- Example: "As a customer, I can't filter restaurants by rating, which makes discovery frustrating." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your ideal solution clearly. Include UI mockups if relevant. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've explored. -->

## Which Role Benefits?
- [ ] Customer
- [ ] Restaurant Partner
- [ ] Delivery Agent
- [ ] Admin

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, references, or screenshots. -->
